---
name: Requirements request
about: For Pegasus team to propose Requirements
title: "[The person or department]:"
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**🌟<h1>1. Source & Business Value (需求來源與價值)</h1>**
   ✔️ Source Details (來源詳情)：

   ✔️ Legal regulations (法規名稱、條文章節)：

   ✔️ Certification (認證標準與條款)：
         <!-- E.g. ISO 27001 Annex A.12.3 - Backup -->

   ✔️ Tender (標案名稱、文件頁碼與項目編號)：

   ✔️ Customers/Users (客戶或回饋來源)：

   ✔️ Business Value / Problem to Solve (商業價值／想要解決的問題)：

<!-- Why are we doing this? What benefits will it bring (e.g., increasing revenue, reducing costs, ensuring regulatory compliance, improving user satisfaction)? What are the risks if we do not proceed?-->

**🌟2. Detailed Description (需求詳述)**
   ✔️ User Story (使用者故事) - (If applicable)：
<!-- 
- As a (身為)  [specific role / 某種角色] E.g.  website administrator, user 
- I want to (我想要)  [perform a certain action / 執行某個動作]
- So that (以便於)  [achieve a specific goal or value / 達成某個目標或價值]
-->
   ✔️Functional Requirements (功能性需求) ：
<!-- 
Use bullet points to clearly describe what the system must do. Each item should be specific and verifiable. (使用條列式，清楚描述系統「必須做什麼」。每一點都應具體、可被驗證。)
E.g. 
1. The system must provide users with the ability to delete their personal accounts. (系統必須提供使用者刪除其個人帳號的功能。)
2. Before deletion, the system must display a confirmation dialog, requiring the user to confirm again. (刪除前，系統必須彈出確認視窗，要求使用者再次確認。)
3. ... (等等)
-->

   ✔️Non-Functional Requirements (非功能性需求) - (If applicable)：


**🌟3. Acceptance Criteria (驗收標準)**
<!-- 
Define “Done” using a testable checklist. The requirement is considered complete only when all criteria are met. (用一個可測試的清單，定義「完成」的標準。當所有標準都滿足時，這個需求才算完成。) 
-->


**🌟4. Constraints & Dependencies (限制與依賴性)**
   ✔️Constraints (技術限制)：
<!-- 
Are there any technical constraints? e.g., For example, must specific APIs be used, or is support for legacy browsers required? (是否有任何技術上的限制？例如：必須使用特定的 API、必須支援舊版瀏覽器等。
-->

   ✔️Dependencies (依賴關係)：
<!-- 
Does this requirement depend on the completion of other requirements, or do other requirements depend on this one? (這個需求是否依賴其他需求先完成？或是其他需求依賴此需求？) 
-->


**🌟5. Attachments & Notes (附件與備註)**
   ✔️Attachments (附件)： 
<!-- 
E.g. UI/UX design mockups, flowcharts, original regulatory documents, customer email screenshots, etc. 
-->

   ✔️Notes (備註)：
<!-- 
E.g. Any additional information that needs to be supplemented. 
-->
